title: Notice of Corrigendum
text:
SECOND SUPPLEMENT TO THE GIBRALTAR
GAZETTE
No. 5297 GIBRALTAR Thursday 9th April 2026
LEGAL NOTICE NO. 71 OF 2026
ENVIRONMENTAL PROTECTION (CONTROLS ON OZONE-DEPLETING
SUBSTANCES) (AMENDMENT) ACT 2026
NOTICE OF CORRIGENDUM
In Act No.18 of 2026 of Gazette No. 5295 of Wednesday, 1st April 2026 substitute the long
title with “AN ACT to amend the Environmental Protection (Controls on Ozone-Depleting
Substances) Act 2014 for the purposes of the implementation of Article 219(4) of the
Agreement in respect of Gibraltar between the European Union and the European Atomic
Energy Community of the one part and the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern
Ireland in respect of Gibraltar and for connected purposes.”.
